servinfo.title: Precautions for Sun Roof / T-Top / Convertible Top

item.ptxt: Perform water leakage test after installing sun roof glass.
Adjust sun roof glass mount position again in case of water leakage. (Replace if sun roof weather-strip is defective.)
Do not apply excessive water pressure during water leakage test.
Do not apply large impact to sun roof motor, such as by dropping it.
Do not pinch any object during initialization of sun roof motor.
Do not use any part of your body such as hand or arm to check this function. Pay enough attention to avoid body from being pinched during check.
Anti-pinching function works only in auto sliding mode in closing direction. Do not check in tilting down mode and manual operation mode.
Roof may deform if hard material such as hammer handle is pinched. (Use hammer handle wrapped with cloth.)
